scripts.build:cvt: PUBLIC_CVT_BASE= PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://cvt.co.ug astro build && node scripts/package-cvt-site.mjs
scripts.deploy:cvt: npm run build:cvt && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.cvt.toml
scripts.preview:cvt: npm run build:cvt && npx wrangler dev --config wrangler.cvt.toml --port 4322
